item.title: Coupled Rigid-Block Analysis (CRA)
item.description: Stability-aware design of complex discrete-element assemblies

item.title: PCA Faces
item.description: 3D face morphing using PCA on high-dimensional point cloud data

item.title: Robotic Force Printing
item.description: MIT Design-Build Workshop exploring robotic additive manufacture of shell structures

item.title: Strabag Clash Management System
item.description: Multi-project BIM issue management system with commenting and model review

item.title: Script-based Product Description
item.description: Using modern programming languages as a file format for 3D product information

item.title: Assembly-Aware Shell Structures
item.description: Computational workflow for assembly-aware design of masonry shell structures

item.title: Leopard
item.description: Open source mesh processing plugin for Grasshopper with subdivision schemes

item.title: PhysX.GH
item.description: Rigid body simulation tool for Grasshopper using NVIDIA PhysX

item.title: ICD/ITKE Research Pavilion 2015/16
item.description: Computational design tools for a bending-active research pavilion at University of Stuttgart

item.title: Robotic Light Sculpture
item.description: Light sculpture created by an industrial robot using Kinect V2 point cloud scanning

item.title: Fish
item.description: 3D swarm simulation with GUI written in Processing

item.title: Rhino.Python Swarm Bridge
item.description: Swarm behaviour simulation in Rhino.Python generating bridge geometry

item.title: Digital Lamp GUI
item.description: Undergraduate architectural thesis GUI for a generative church prototype, written in Processing/Java

item.title: Butterfly Effect Pavilion
item.description: Parametric pavilion design for Ilan Green Expo 2014

item.title: LEGO Tool for Rhino
item.description: Python script for Rhino to design and 3D print customised LEGO components

item.title: Barycentric Coordinates
item.description: Deriving barycentric coordinates from dot products — a fundamental tool for point-in-triangle tests, mesh interpolation, and more.

item.title: Open-Sourcing GENEATCG.com
item.description: The source code behind this website is now public. Here's how it's built and why I decided to open it up.

item.title: Ansys Joins Synopsys
item.description: A new chapter as the Ansys team becomes part of Synopsys, continuing work in computational geometry, meshing, and geometric algorithms.

item.title: Made in Science Podcast #44 — Engineering is like cooking and art
item.description: Featured on the University of Stuttgart's Made in Science podcast, discussing 3D computational geometry, architecture, and the journey as a designer, engineer, and scientist.

item.title: Remembering Genie
item.description: One year ago, we lost our beloved Genie. A tribute to a free and beautiful soul.

item.title: Doctor of Sciences — ETH Zürich
item.description: My PhD dissertation 'Stability Assessment of Discrete Shell Structures during Assembly' is now available online.

item.title: I Defended My PhD at ETH Zürich!
item.description: After 4.5 wonderful years at ETH Zürich, I successfully defended my PhD dissertation on the stability assessment of discrete shell structures.

item.title: Joining Ansys — From Zürich to Stockholm
item.description: Starting a new chapter as R&D Engineer II at Ansys, working on 3D Geometry Processing and Computational Geometry.

item.title: COMPAS CRA — Open Source Release
item.description: Coupled Rigid-Block Analysis (CRA) for the COMPAS framework is now open source.

item.title: Adopting Genie — 浪浪別哭 Podcast Ep. 36
item.description: Our story of adopting Genie from Taiwan to Switzerland, featured on the 浪浪別哭 (Lang Lang Don't Cry) podcast.

item.title: Coupled Rigid-Block Analysis (CRA) — Published in CAD
item.description: Our latest research on Coupled Rigid-Block Analysis (CRA) is published in the SCI journal Computer-Aided Design.

item.title: Emacs Org Mode export to pdf
item.description: How to use Emacs Org Mode with LaTeX templates to write and export research documents to PDF.

item.title: oh-my-phd
item.description: A reflection on 4.5 years of doctoral research at ETH Zürich — the highs, the lows, and everything in between.

item.title: Rhino Mac PyCharm autocomplete
item.description: Setting up PyCharm for Rhino Python scripting on Mac with full autocomplete support.

item.title: Using Git like a Pro
item.description: A comprehensive Git tutorial covering branching, rebasing, stashing, and workflows for professional software development.

item.title: 離島人 Humans Offshore Podcast EP052 — 建築設計、數位製造與電腦科學的跨領域研究
item.description: Featured on 離島人 | Humans Offshore Podcast, sharing my interdisciplinary journey across architecture, digital fabrication, and computer science at ETH Zürich.

item.title: Robotic Force Printing - MIT Design-Build Workshop 2019
item.description: Exploring robotic fabrication and force-based 3D printing at the MIT Design-Build Workshop 2019 in Shanghai.

item.title: PhysX.GH
item.description: PhysX.GH - a rigid body simulation tool for Grasshopper.

item.title: Assembly-aware design of masonry shell structures: a computational approach
item.description: My master thesis work published in IASS Hamburg 2017.

item.title: Leopard
item.description: Leopard - A new way to process mesh in Grasshopper.

item.title: ICD/ITKE Research Pavilion 2015-16 - development and implementation demo
item.description: Computational tool development for the ICD/ITKE Research Pavilion 2015-16 — from mesh input to robotically fabricated plate geometry.

item.title: Emacs settings
item.description: My Emacs configuration for academic writing and programming, including org-mode, LaTeX export, and development setup.

item.title: Swarm 3D GUI – with a tail
item.description: 3D swarm simulation with interactive GUI built in Processing, exploring emergent behavior in computational design.

item.title: Master Thesis Reading
item.description: Reading list from my master thesis research at Stuttgart University, covering steering behaviors for autonomous characters and the construction of Gothic cathedrals.

item.title: DigitalLampThesisGUI_v0a01
item.description: GUI development for the Digital Lamp of Architecture — bachelor thesis coding project at Tamkang University.

item.title: Writing a thesis with LaTex
item.description: Scientific writing using LaTex of my master thesis.

item.title: Rhino.Python
item.description: Computational design experiments in Rhino.Python: parametric structures, swarm bridge, tessellation, and Boy Surface subdivision.

item.title: Computation and Aesthetics
item.description: Undergraduate portfolio exploring the intersection of computation and aesthetics, developed at Tamkang University.

item.title: Processing 101
item.description: Creative coding experiments in Processing 101 — parametric shapes, animations, and interactive sketches.

item.title: Butterfly Effect Pavilion in I-Lan Green Expo 2014
item.description: Parametric design and construction of the Butterfly Effect Pavilion for the I-Lan Green Expo 2014 in Taiwan.

item.title: Swarm Python Component
item.description: Implementing swarm intelligence algorithms as a Grasshopper GH_Python component for computational design.

item.title: LEGO Component for 3D Printing
item.description: Design and 3D print your own customised LEGO components using a Python script in Rhino 3D.

item.title: Clock Design
item.description: Two minimalist clock designs built with Processing — a basic geometric clock and a Mondaine-inspired Swiss railway clock.

item.title: Bachelor thesis design
item.description: Design process documentation for my bachelor thesis — the Digital Lamp of Architecture — at Tamkang University.

item.title: The Digital Lamp of Architecture – A New Church Prototype
item.description: Bachelor thesis project at Tamkang University — a new church prototype concept exploring digital fabrication and architectural lighting.
